name: Octomind Deploy Verifier Plan
purpose: Verify and repair cloud deployment without giving the operator Mac, terminal, Finder, Desktop, or double-click work.

repair_sequence.action: Check GitHub workflow visibility and statuses
If no workflow exists, keep deploy blocker open and mark portal as repo-ready but live-unconfirmed
If workflow exists but fails, classify failure as missing secret, permission, syntax, or Cloudflare API issue
If workflow succeeds, check runtime /health and /reality before marking GREEN

fallback_when_blocked: do not assign local work to operator
next_system_action: Create a runtime verification issue and continue revenue experiments independently of deploy confirmation.
